definitions: 任由…摆布；受…支配；无力反抗…

examples.text: The increasing digitisation of our society means that everything from paying a gas bill to plotting a route to a friend’s house and even making a phone call is at the mercy of your internet connection.
examples.explanation: 这里的 at the mercy of your internet connection 表示“受你的网络连接状况支配 / 任由网络状况摆布”。整句意思是：社会越来越数字化，导致从交燃气费、规划去朋友家的路线，到甚至打电话这样的大事小事，都要看网络是否给力。
